hero.headline: Welcome to Pokémon Resort.
hero.subheadline: A fan-made resort between your adventures. Store Pokémon from every generation, help them settle in, and watch the island fill out as we build it.

about.title: A resort between your adventures.
body: Pokémon Resort is an unofficial, non-commercial fan project. It gives the Pokémon from your past games a place on the island instead of leaving them in a box.
Transfers and PC storage follow the DS-era flow, but the resort itself is the main screen. Pokémon wander the island, join activities, and bump into guests. We want it to feel busy, not like a menu.
You play as the resort concierge. Check in guests, handle requests, run minigames, and unlock rooms and resort upgrades. The main story is still being scoped.

carousel.title: Home between adventures
carousel.caption: Storage lives at the resort, not in a separate box screen.

carousel.caption: Guests, requests, minigames, and resort upgrades.

carousel.title: Every generation welcome
carousel.caption: DS-style transfers, with a route checklist for each generation pair.
